Event: Magic Well - September 2024
Event Date: 08/09/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AM156


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Explorer Chest
Mystic Reader Amulet

For the duration of the battle, the unit's spell power is increased by 10% for each living enemy and each dead ally on the battlefield.

Once in a while, the unit casts a shield on themself and 2 random allies (preferred target: mages) that absorbs damage equal to 150% of the amulet owner's spell power. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝
